cauhoi.de: My sister enjoys ______ badminton in her free time.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Enjoy + V-ing: thích làm gì.

cauhoi.de: Do you fancy ______ to the cinema tonight?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Fancy + V-ing: thích, muốn làm gì.

cauhoi.de: He hates ______ up early on Sundays.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hate + V-ing: ghét làm gì.

cauhoi.de: They love ______ time with their grandparents.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Love + V-ing: yêu thích làm gì.

cauhoi.de: I don't mind ______ you with your homework.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Mind + V-ing: phiền làm gì.

cauhoi.de: She prefers ______ to music to watching TV.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Prefer + V-ing to + V-ing: thích làm gì hơn làm gì.

cauhoi.de: We dislike ______ in crowded places.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Dislike + V-ing: không thích làm gì.

cauhoi.de: Do you enjoy ______ new people?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Enjoy + V-ing: thích làm gì.

cauhoi.de: My brother suggested ______ to the beach instead of the mountain.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Suggest + V-ing: đề nghị làm gì.

cauhoi.de: She admitted ______ the window, but she didn't mean to break it.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Admit + V-ing: thừa nhận đã làm gì.

cauhoi.de: He runs ______ than his brother.
cauhoi.giai_thich: So sánh hơn của trạng từ ngắn: fast → faster.

cauhoi.de: She speaks English ______ than I do.
cauhoi.giai_thich: So sánh hơn của trạng từ dài: more fluently.

cauhoi.de: Please drive ______. The road is slippery.
cauhoi.giai_thich: So sánh hơn: more carefully.

cauhoi.de: He arrived at the party ______ than expected.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Late → later (so sánh hơn).

cauhoi.de: Can you speak a bit ______? I can't hear you well.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Speak louder (trạng từ ngắn).

cauhoi.de: She danced ______ than anyone else in the contest.
cauhoi.giai_thich: So sánh hơn với trạng từ dài.

cauhoi.de: This computer works ______ than the old one.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Well → better (bất quy tắc).

cauhoi.de: He visits his grandmother ______ than his sister does.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Trạng từ dài: more frequently.

cauhoi.de: Tom ran 100m in 12 seconds, and Jerry ran it in 13 seconds. So Tom ran ______ than Jerry.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Thời gian ngắn hơn → chạy nhanh hơn.

cauhoi.de: The harder you study, ______ you will understand.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Cấu trúc so sánh càng...càng: The + comparative + S + V, the + comparative + S + V.

cauhoi.de: If you ______ heat ice, it melts.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Câu điều kiện loại 0/1: If + hiện tại đơn, hiện tại đơn.

cauhoi.de: If it rains tomorrow, we ______ the match.
cauhoi.giai_thich: If + hiện tại đơn, will + V.

cauhoi.de: She ______ late if she doesn't hurry.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Câu điều kiện loại 1.

cauhoi.de: If you don't eat breakfast, you ______ hungry later.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Điều kiện có thể xảy ra ở tương lai.

cauhoi.de: What ______ you do if you miss the bus?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Câu hỏi điều kiện loại 1.

cauhoi.de: If she studies hard, she ______ the exam.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Tương lai đơn ở mệnh đề chính.

cauhoi.de: Unless you ______ more exercise, you will gain weight.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Unless = if not, theo sau là hiện tại đơn.

cauhoi.de: If you put ice in a warm place, it ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Sự thật hiển nhiên dùng hiện tại đơn, nhưng ở đây dự đoán tương lai.

cauhoi.de: If we ______ the environment, we will have a better life.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Mệnh đề if: hiện tại đơn.

cauhoi.de: I won't go to the party unless you ______ with me.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Unless + hiện tại đơn, mệnh đề chính tương lai đơn.

cauhoi.de: At 8 o'clock last night, I ______ TV.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Thì quá khứ tiếp diễn diễn tả hành động đang xảy ra tại một thời điểm xác định trong quá khứ.

cauhoi.de: They ______ football when it started to rain.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hành động đang xảy ra thì có hành động khác cắt ngang.

cauhoi.de: While I ______ to school, I met my old friend.
cauhoi.giai_thich: While + quá khứ tiếp diễn.

cauhoi.de: What ______ you doing at 7 pm yesterday?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Câu hỏi với were (you).

cauhoi.de: She ______ dinner when the phone rang.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hành động đang xảy ra (cook) thì hành động khác xen vào (rang).

cauhoi.de: Yesterday afternoon, we ______ in the park while it was sunny.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hai hành động song song trong quá khứ.

cauhoi.de: When I came in, they ______ about the movie.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hành động đang diễn ra (talk) thì hành động khác xen vào (came).

cauhoi.de: While my mother was cooking, my father ______ the newspaper.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hai hành động song song trong quá khứ.

cauhoi.de: The children ______ asleep while the teacher was explaining the lesson.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hành động đang diễn ra (fall asleep) trong khi hành động khác xảy ra.

cauhoi.de: He ______ to the radio when he heard a strange noise outside.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hành động đang diễn ra (was listening) thì hành động khác cắt ngang.

cauhoi.de: I promise I ______ you tomorrow.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Will + V để hứa hẹn.

cauhoi.de: They ______ a new house next year.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Thì tương lai đơn diễn tả hành động sẽ xảy ra trong tương lai.

cauhoi.de: She ______ probably be late because of the traffic.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Will + V dự đoán có căn cứ.

cauhoi.de: We ______ go to the cinema if we have time.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Tương lai đơn trong mệnh đề chính.

cauhoi.de: ______ you help me with this box, please?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Will dùng để yêu cầu lịch sự.

cauhoi.de: I think it ______ sunny tomorrow.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Dự đoán trong tương lai với I think.

cauhoi.de: She said she ______ back soon.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Tường thuật lời nói (lùi thì: will → would).

cauhoi.de: The meeting ______ at 9 am tomorrow.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Lịch trình trong tương lai có thể dùng hiện tại đơn, nhưng ở đây sẽ dùng will start.

cauhoi.de: Wait here, I ______ you when I'm ready.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hứa hẹn trong tương lai.

cauhoi.de: Unless you study harder, you ______ the exam.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Unless + hiện tại, mệnh đề chính tương lai đơn (phủ định).

cauhoi.de: What is the activity of moving through water using your arms and legs?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Bơi lội (swimming).

cauhoi.de: Which activity involves riding a bicycle?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Đạp xe (cycling).

cauhoi.de: Playing chess is an example of a(n) ______ activity.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Chơi cờ là hoạt động trong nhà.

cauhoi.de: What do you call the activity of watching films at home?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Xem TV (watching TV) / watching movies at home.

cauhoi.de: Collecting stamps is a popular ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Sưu tập tem là sở thích (hobby).

cauhoi.de: My grandmother enjoys ______. She knitters scarves and hats.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Đan len (knitting).

cauhoi.de: In my free time, I often ______ the internet to read news.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Lướt web (surf the internet).

cauhoi.de: He spends hours playing online games. That's his favorite ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hoạt động giải trí (leisure activity).

cauhoi.de: Which of the following is NOT an indoor leisure activity?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Leo núi là hoạt động ngoài trời.

cauhoi.de: Teenagers today often combine leisure activities and social media by ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Kết hợp sở thích với mạng xã hội: đăng ảnh lên mạng.

cauhoi.de: A person who works on a farm is called a ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Nông dân (farmer).

cauhoi.de: A large area of land with many trees is called a ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Rừng (forest).

cauhoi.de: Which animal is raised for milk and meat in the countryside?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Bò sữa/bò thịt (cow).

cauhoi.de: What is a common means of transport in the countryside?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Máy kéo (tractor) dùng trong nông nghiệp.

cauhoi.de: The countryside is often ______ than the city.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Nông thôn yên tĩnh hơn (quieter).

cauhoi.de: In the countryside, people often grow vegetables in the ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Vườn rau (garden).

cauhoi.de: Harvest time is when farmers ______ their crops.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Thu hoạch (harvest = collect crops).

cauhoi.de: The air in the countryside is usually ______ because there are fewer factories.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Không khí trong lành (fresh air).

cauhoi.de: Which of the following is an advantage of living in the countryside?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Môi trường yên bình là lợi thế của nông thôn.

cauhoi.de: People in the countryside tend to have a strong sense of ______ because they help each other in farming.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Tinh thần cộng đồng (community) cao ở nông thôn.

cauhoi.de: Teenagers are people aged from ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Tuổi teen: 13-19 (teen + age).

cauhoi.de: Many teenagers use ______ to chat with friends.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Mạng xã hội (social media).

cauhoi.de: Teenagers often face ______ from school and parents.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Áp lực (pressure).

cauhoi.de: A person between childhood and adulthood is called a(n) ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Thiếu niên (teenager).

cauhoi.de: Many teenagers do ______ work to help the community.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Công việc tình nguyện (voluntary work).

cauhoi.de: Teenagers are often influenced by their ______ (friends of the same age).
cauhoi.giai_thich: Bạn bè đồng trang lứa (peers).

cauhoi.de: During puberty, teenagers experience ______ changes.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Thay đổi cả thể chất lẫn cảm xúc.

cauhoi.de: A common ______ among teenagers is staying up late to use smartphones.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Thói quen (habit).

cauhoi.de: Which of the following is a healthy activity for teenagers?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Tham gia câu lạc bộ thể thao là lành mạnh.

cauhoi.de: Many teenagers struggle with ______ because they compare themselves to others on social media.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Lòng tự trọng (self-esteem) thấp do so sánh trên mạng xã hội.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word with the sound /u:/.
cauhoi.giai_thich: /u:/ dài, như trong 'food'. Book, look, good phát âm /ʊ/.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word with the sound /ʊ/.
cauhoi.giai_thich: /ʊ/ ngắn, 'cook'. Moon, soon, school: /u:/.

cauhoi.de: Which word has the vowel sound /u:/?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Blue: /blu:/.

cauhoi.de: Which word has the vowel sound /ʊ/ ?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Wool: /wʊl/.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word that has a different sound from the others.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Foot /ʊ/; boot, shoot, root /u:/.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word that has a different sound from the others.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Full /ʊ/; truth, rude, rude (lỗi) /u:/.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word that has a different sound from the others.
cauhoi.giai_thich: June /u:/; push, pull, bull /ʊ/.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word that has a different sound from the others.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Young /jʌŋ/ khác, nhưng trong /u:/ vs /ʊ/: group, through, you /u:/; young /ʊ/?

cauhoi.de: Which of the following pairs has the same vowel sound?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Book và look đều /ʊ/.

cauhoi.de: Identify the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently:
cauhoi.giai_thich: Butcher /ʊ/; duty, student, ruler /u:/ (hoặc /ju:/).

cauhoi.de: Read the text: 'Tom is a 14-year-old boy. He loves playing football and often plays with his friends after school. He also enjoys helping his mother cook dinner.' What does Tom enjoy doing?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Bài đọc: 'also enjoys helping his mother cook dinner'.

cauhoi.de: Read the text: 'The countryside is quieter than the city. People there often work in fields and raise animals. They have a close-knit community.' What does 'close-knit' mean?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Close-knit = gắn bó, đoàn kết.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'Teenagers often face stress from exams. They should learn to manage their time wisely to reduce pressure.' What should teenagers do to reduce stress?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Quản lý thời gian hợp lý (manage time wisely).

cauhoi.de: Read: 'If you study hard, you will pass the exam. If you don't, you will fail.' According to the sentence, passing the exam depends on what?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Điều kiện: nếu học chăm chỉ.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'Last Sunday, at 6 p.m., Mary was doing her homework while her brother was watching TV. Suddenly, the power went out.' What happened suddenly?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Suddenly, the power went out.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'I don't mind helping you with the dishes, but I hate cooking. Could you please cook dinner tonight?' The speaker is willing to ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Don't mind helping with dishes = sẵn lòng rửa bát.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'My friend runs faster than me, but I swim better than him. We often compete in both sports.' Who swims better?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Tôi bơi giỏi hơn (I swim better).

cauhoi.de: Read the text: 'Many teenagers spend hours on social media every day. This can lead to lack of sleep, poor concentration, and less physical activity. However, social media also helps them connect with friends and express themselves.' What is one negative effect mentioned?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Tác hại: thiếu ngủ (lack of sleep).

cauhoi.de: Read: 'If the city had more parks, people would exercise more. However, building parks is expensive.' What is the main idea?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Công viên tốt nhưng đắt.

cauhoi.de: Read the conversation: 'A: 'Would you like to go to the cinema?' B: 'I'd love to, but I have to finish my project.' What does B mean?
cauhoi.b: B cannot go because B is busy
cauhoi.giai_thich: Từ chối lịch sự vì bận.
